title: Separate image-to-video and text-to-video from video models?
description: Currently, we have WAN 2.2 that incorporates both t2v and i2v, users might want to use only one or the other, so we will create two separate ones, one just for image-to-video and one just for text-to-video. We need to keep in consideration that they support multi-stage, so let's add them as new models. In the model description, add that the big one includes everything and the other ones are just text-to-video or image-to-video. Rules and documentation should be read before implementing.
